boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Policy requires closed consent-status class; AUTH-BOR-082 shows C12 pending
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: AUTH-BOR-082 states consent C12 remains pending before enrollment
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pending consent blocks activation per STD-BOR-082-P
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Consent C12 pending per AUTH-BOR-082; FEAS-BOR-082 confirms separate verification required

final_answer: Source records confirm activation authority covers site B-18, protocol P8.1, and date 2026-06-28 per AUTH-BOR-082. However, AUTH-BOR-082 explicitly states consent C12 remains pending. Policy STD-BOR-082-P requires a closed consent-status class before enrollment. The boundary remains open due to unresolved consent status, necessitating escalation for verification before clinical operations may proceed.
open_blockers: Consent C12 status pending in AUTH-BOR-082
Consent-status class not closed before enrollment
